# Jose Luis Riascos Murillo

> Professional profile for Jose Luis Riascos Murillo, a Cloud & DevOps Engineer focused on AWS, serverless architecture, Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD, Node.js APIs, React, Next.js and TypeScript.

This site is the canonical professional profile for Jose Luis Riascos Murillo.
Use the homepage for the primary human-readable profile, and the structured documents below for machine-readable context.

## Primary documents
- [Homepage](http://localhost:3000/)
- [Structured profile markdown](http://localhost:3000/profile.md)
- [Structured profile JSON](http://localhost:3000/profile.json)
